recommendations: Warm, heavy, oily foods to pacify Vata. Incorporate root vegetables, hearty stews, and warming spices like ginger and cinnamon.
Cooling, light, and sweet foods to pacify Pitta. Emphasize fresh fruits, salads, coconut water, and mint.
Light, dry, and warming foods to pacify Kapha. Focus on bitter greens, legumes, and spicy foods to clear congestion.
Light, fresh, and easily digestible foods. Ginger, lemon, and warm soups help counteract sluggish digestion.
Cooling and slightly sweet foods to balance the heat of Pitta. Ghee, milk, and sweet fruits are beneficial.
